definition.title: RENDERINGS: LHS Facility Renderings (Visual Vision Library)
definition.objective: Future-state visual authority. High-gravity moments. Use for expansion announcements, capital raise discussions, infrastructure reform conversations, relay network visual explanation, or recruiting visionary partners.
definition.target_audience: Investors, strategic partners, drivers (aspirational), LinkedIn professional audience, industry thought leaders
definition.cadence: 1-2 times per month max. Strategic waves around major announcements. Overuse reduces impact.

campaign_card.target_audience: Investors, strategic partners, drivers (aspirational), LinkedIn professional audience, industry thought leaders
key_messages: Aspirational authority content — makes abstract strategy feel real
Not daily content — high-gravity deployment moments only
New updated rendering set coming — current set is Version 1

initiatives: Lifelike AI enhancements. Slow pan/zoom reels with voiceover. Vision campaign series. LinkedIn authority posts. Side-by-side evolution posts

_legacy_card.description: Original vision renderings representing the physical manifestation of Line Haul Station. Infrastructure design concepts, built-environment vision, and tangible outcome of the Flip Freight Relay Network model.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Future-state visual authority. High-gravity moments. Use for expansion announcements, capital raise discussions, infrastructure reform conversations, relay network visual explanation, or recruiting visionary partners.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Vision positioning. Infrastructure thought leadership. Cost-of-inefficiency discussion. Industry redesign narrative. Real estate + logistics innovation crossover.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for static use. AI upscaling and video conversions may use credits.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Lifelike AI enhancements. Slow pan/zoom reels with voiceover. Vision campaign series. LinkedIn authority posts. Side-by-side evolution posts when new renderings arrive.
_legacy_card.timeline: 1-2 times per month max. Strategic waves around major announcements. Overuse reduces impact.
